children.heading: Ranges of frequencies
children.label: a Ranges of frequencies
children.text: Each range of frequencies described in this chapter shall be construed to be inclusive of the upper and lower frequencies in the range.

children.heading: Assessment of electromagnetic spectrum reallocation
children.label: b Assessment of electromagnetic spectrum reallocation
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to affect any requirement under section 156 of the National Telecommunications and Information Administration Organization Act ( note), as added by section 1062(a) of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2000.47 U.S.C. 921
